title: Maya World Says She'll Be 'Chasing' Feeling Of AEW Forbidden Door Match
summary: Maya World has been on an ascent in AEW since competing in the Owen Hart Cup Foundation tournament as a last minute replacement for Sareee.
imageAlt: Maya World Says She'll Be 'Chasing' Feeling Of AEW Forbidden Door Match
aiSummary: Maya World has been on an ascent in AEW since competing in the Owen Hart Cup Foundation tournament as a last minute replacement for Sareee.

whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.

multimedia.alt: Maya World Says She'll Be 'Chasing' Feeling Of AEW Forbidden Door Match
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle:
Maya World may have come up short in the Women's Casino Gauntlet on "Dynamite: Beach Break", but she's still on an upward trajectory. While dealing with the tragic loss of her brother, World has been able to maintain her momentum in the ring. She entered the Owen Hart Foundation Cup tournament as a replacement for Sareee just days after her brother's death. She defeated Skye Blue and Athena before succumbing to Mercedes Moné in the tournament finals at Forbidden Door.

Even in loss, World is not defeated. During Highspots Sign It Live, "The It Girl" reflected on facing her idol, Moné. She doesn't believe the match will end up being a blip in her career. "Mercedes is like my idol and honestly, I'll probably chase that feeling of being in the ring with her for the rest of my career. It was a...
